Text.en: <white>{Reforge} a <white>{Rare} item, being <white>{more likely} to receive the same modifier types
Text.zh: <white>{重铸}一件<white>{稀有}物品，大概率<white>{会}得到相同词缀类型

Description.en: Reforge a Rare item, being more likely to receive the same modifier types
Description.zh: 重铸稀有物品，更有可能获得相同的词缀类型。

Text.en: <white>{Reforge} a <white>{Rare} item, being <white>{less likely} to receive the same modifier types
Text.zh: <white>{重铸}一件<white>{稀有}物品，大概率<white>{不会}得到相同词缀类型

Description.en: Reforge a Rare item, being less likely to receive the same modifier types
Description.zh: 重铸稀有物品，不太可能得到相同的词缀类型。

Text.en: <white>{Sacrifice} a Rare <white>{Corrupted Map}. Create a new Corrupted Map of the same tier and rarity.
Text.zh: <white>{献祭}一张稀有<white>{腐化的地图}，生成一张相同位阶和稀有度的新腐化的地图。

Description.en: Sacrifice a Rare Corrupted Map. Create a new Corrupted Map of the same tier and rarity.
Description.zh: 献祭一张稀有腐化的地图，生成一张相同位阶和稀有度的新腐化的地图。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Fossils} into a different type of Fossil. The new Fossil type may have a smaller stack size. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{化石}<white>{变为}另一种类型的化石。新的化石类型可能堆叠数量较小。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Fossils into a different type of Fossil. The new Fossil type may have a smaller stack size. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 把一堆化石变为另一种类型的化石。新的化石类型可能堆叠数量较小。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Oils} into a different colour of Oil. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{圣油}<white>{变为}另一种颜色的圣油。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Oils into a different colour of Oil. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆圣油变为另一种颜色的圣油。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Catalysts} into a different type of Catalyst. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{催化剂}<white>{变为}另一种类型的催化剂。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Catalysts into a different type of Catalyst. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆催化剂变为另一种类型的催化剂。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Essences} into a different type of the same tier. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{精华}<white>{变为}另一种类型但位阶相同的精华。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Essences into a different type of the same tier. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆精华变为另一种类型但位阶相同的精华。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Timeless Splinters} or a <white>{Timeless Emblem} into Splinters or an Emblem of another type. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{永恒碎片}或<white>{永恒印记}<white>{变为}另一种类型的碎片或印记。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Timeless Splinters or a Timeless Emblem into Splinters or an Emblem of another type. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆永恒碎片或永恒印记变为另一种类型的碎片或印记。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Breach Splinters} or a normal or Flawless <white>{Breachstone} into Splinters or a Breachstone of another type. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{裂隙碎片}或普通或无瑕<white>{裂隙石}<white>{变为}另一种类型的碎片或裂隙石。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Breach Splinters or a normal or Flawless Breachstone into Splinters or a Breachstone of another type. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆裂隙碎片或普通或无瑕裂隙石变为另一种类型的碎片或裂隙石。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Scarabs} to a different type of the same rarity. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{圣甲虫}<white>{变为}另一种类型但稀有度相同的圣甲虫。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Scarabs to a different type of the same rarity. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆圣甲虫变为另一种类型但稀有度相同的圣甲虫。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Delirium Orbs} into a different type of Delirium Orb. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{雾魇宝珠}<white>{变为}另一种类型的雾魇宝珠。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a stack of Delirium Orbs into a different type of Delirium Orb. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一堆雾魇宝珠变为另一种类型的雾魇宝珠。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a <white>{Divination Card} into another random Divination Card
Text.zh: 将一张<white> {命运卡}<white>{变为}另一张随机命运卡

Description.en: Change a Divination Card into another random Divination Card
Description.zh: 将一个 命运卡变为另一个随机命运卡

Text.en: <white>{Change} a modifier that grants <craftingcold>{Cold} Resistance into a similar-tier modifier that grants <craftingfire>{Fire} Resistance
Text.zh: 将一个提供<craftingcold>{冰霜}抗性的词缀<white>{变为}近似位阶，但提供<craftingfire>{火焰}抗性的词缀

Description.en: Change a modifier that grants Cold Resistance into a similar-tier modifier that grants Fire Resistance
Description.zh: 将一个提供冰霜抗性的词缀变为近似位阶，但提供火焰抗性的词缀

Text.zh: 将一个提供<craftinglightning>{闪电}抗性的词缀<white>{变为}近似位阶，但提供<craftingfire>{火焰}抗性的词缀

Description.zh: 将一个提供闪电抗性的词缀变为近似位阶，但提供火焰抗性的词缀

Text.zh: 将一个提供<craftingfire>{火焰}抗性的词缀<white>{变为}近似位阶，但提供<craftingcold>{冰霜}抗性的词缀

Description.zh: 将一个提供火焰抗性的词缀变为近似位阶，但提供冰霜抗性的词缀

Text.zh: 将一个提供<craftinglightning>{闪电}抗性的词缀<white>{变为}近似位阶，但提供<craftingcold>{冰霜}抗性的词缀

Description.zh: 将一个提供闪电抗性的词缀变为近似位阶，但提供冰霜抗性的词缀

Text.zh: 将一个提供<craftingfire>{火焰}抗性的词缀<white>{变为}近似位阶，但提供<craftinglightning>{闪电}抗性的词缀

Description.zh: 将一个提供火焰抗性的词缀变为近似位阶，但提供闪电抗性的词缀

Text.en: <white>{Change} a modifier that grants <craftingcold>{Cold} Resistance into a similar-tier modifier that grants <craftinglightning>{Lightning} Resistance
Text.zh: 将一个提供<craftingcold>{冰霜}抗性的词缀<white>{变为}近似位阶，但提供<craftinglightning>{闪电}抗性的词缀

Description.en: Change a modifier that grants Cold Resistance into a similar-tier modifier that grants Lightning Resistance
Description.zh: 将一个提供冰霜抗性的词缀变为近似位阶，但提供闪电抗性的词缀

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Flask} with a modifier that grants <enchanted>{increased Duration}. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Text.zh: 给<white>{药剂}<white>{附魔}一个可以<enchanted>{增加持续时间}的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Description.en: Enchant a Flask with a modifier that grants increased Duration. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Description.zh: 给药剂附魔一个可以增加持续时间的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Flask} with a modifier that grants <enchanted>{increased Maximum Charges}. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Text.zh: 给<white>{药剂}<white>{附魔}一个可以<enchanted>{增加最大充能}的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Description.en: Enchant a Flask with a modifier that grants increased Maximum Charges. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Description.zh: 给药剂附魔一个可以增加最大充能的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Flask} with a modifier that grants <enchanted>{increased Effect}. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Text.zh: 给<white>{药剂}<white>{附魔}一个可以<enchanted>{增加效果}的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Description.en: Enchant a Flask with a modifier that grants increased Effect. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Description.zh: 给药剂附魔一个可以增加效果的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Flask} with a modifier that grants <enchanted>{reduced Charges used}. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Text.zh: 给<white>{药剂}<white>{附魔}一个可以<enchanted>{减少充能用量}的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Description.en: Enchant a Flask with a modifier that grants reduced Charges used. The magnitude of this effect decreases with each use
Description.zh: 给药剂附魔一个可以减少充能用量的词缀。这种影响程度随着使用次数逐渐降低

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Shaper Fragments} into other random Shaper Fragments. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{塑界者碎片}<white>{变为}其他随机的塑界者碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a Shaper Fragment into another random Shaper Fragment. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一块塑界者碎片变为另一块随机的塑界者碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Elder Fragments} into other random Elder Fragments. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{裂界者碎片}<white>{变为}其他随机的裂界者碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change an Elder Fragment into another random Elder Fragment. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一块裂界者碎片变为另一块随机的裂界者碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Conqueror Fragments} into other random Conqueror Fragments. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{征服者碎片}<white>{变为}其他随机的征服者碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a Conqueror Fragment into another random Conqueror Fragment. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一块征服者碎片变为另一块随机的征服者碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Change} a stack of <white>{Sacrifice} or <white>{Mortal Fragments} into other random Fragments of that type. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Text.zh: 将一堆<white>{祭品}或<white>{凡人碎片}<white>{变为}同一类型的其他随机碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Description.en: Change a Sacrifice or Mortal Fragment into another random Fragment of that type. Cost is proportional to stack size.
Description.zh: 将一件祭品或凡人碎片变为同一类型的其他随机碎片。消耗与堆叠数量成比例。

Text.en: <white>{Sacrifice} up to half a stack of <white>{Divination Cards} to receive between 0 and twice that amount of the same Card
Text.zh: <white>{献祭}最多半叠<white>{命运卡}，获得相同命运卡的数量可能为0，也可能翻倍。

Description.en: Sacrifice up to half a stack of Divination Cards to receive between 0 and twice that amount of the same Card
Description.zh: 献祭最多半叠命运卡，相同命运卡的数量可能为0，也可能翻倍

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a non-Unique <white>{Map} with <enchanted>{Map has 50% chance to not consume Sextant Uses}
Text.zh: 给非传奇<white>{地图}<white>{附魔}：<enchanted>{地图有50%几率不消耗六分仪使用次数}

Description.en: Enchant a non-Unique Map with Map has 50% chance to not consume Sextant Uses
Description.zh: 给非传奇地图附魔地图有50%几率不消耗六分仪使用次数

Text.en: <white>{Sacrifice} a <white>{Corrupted Gem} to gain 50% of the gem's total experience stored as a <white>{Facetor's Lens}
Text.zh: <white>{献祭}一颗<white>{腐化技能石}，获得其总存量经验的50%，该经验以<white>{费斯特的透镜}形式储存。

Description.en: Sacrifice a Corrupted Gem to gain 50% of the gem's total experience stored as a Facetor's Lens
Description.zh: 献祭腐化技能石，获其总存量经验50%的费斯特的透镜

Text.en: <white>{Randomise} the <white>{Influence} types on an Influenced Normal, Magic or Rare <white>{Item}, as well as <white>{reforging} the item with new random modifiers
Text.zh: <white>{随机化}受影响的普通物品、魔法物品或稀有物品的<white>{影响}类型，并使用新的随机词缀<white>{重铸}物品

Description.en: Randomise the Influence types on an Influenced Normal, Magic or Rare Item, as well as reforging the item with new random modifiers
Description.zh: 随机化受影响的普通物品、魔法物品或稀有物品的影响类型，并使用新的随机词缀重铸物品

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Body Armour}. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants <enchanted>{+1 Maximum Life per 2% quality}
Text.zh: <white>{附魔}一件<white>{护甲}。品质不会增加其防御，<enchanted>{品质每增加2%，最多增加1点生命}。

Description.en: Enchant a Body Armour. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants +1 Maximum Life per 2% quality
Description.zh: 附魔一件护甲。质量不会增加其防御，质量每增加2%，最多增加1点生命。

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Body Armour}. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants <enchanted>{+1 Maximum Mana per 2% quality}
Text.zh: <white>{附魔}一件<white>{护甲}。品质不会增加其防御，<enchanted>{品质每增加2%，最多增加1点魔力}。

Description.en: Enchant a Body Armour. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants +1 Maximum Mana per 2% quality
Description.zh: 附魔一件护甲。质量不会增加其防御，质量每增加2%，最多增加1点魔力。

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Body Armour}. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants <enchanted>{+1 Strength per 2% quality}
Text.zh: <white>{附魔}一件<white>{护甲}。品质不会增加其防御，<enchanted>{品质每增加2%，增加1点力量}。

Description.en: Enchant a Body Armour. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants +1 Strength per 2% quality
Description.zh: 附魔一件护甲。质量不会增加其防御，质量每增加2%，增加1点力量。

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Body Armour}. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants <enchanted>{+1 Dexterity per 2% quality}
Text.zh: <white>{附魔}一件<white>{护甲}。品质不会增加其防御，<enchanted>{品质每增加2%，增加1点敏捷}。

Description.en: Enchant a Body Armour. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants +1 Dexterity per 2% quality
Description.zh: 附魔一件护甲。质量不会增加其防御，质量每增加2%，增加1点敏捷。

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Body Armour}. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants <enchanted>{+1 Intelligence per 2% quality}
Text.zh: <white>{附魔}一件<white>{护甲}。品质不会增加其防御，<enchanted>{品质每增加2%，增加1点智慧}。

Description.en: Enchant a Body Armour. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants +1 Intelligence per 2% quality
Description.zh: 附魔一件护甲。质量不会增加其防御，质量每增加2%，增加1点智慧。

Text.en: <white>{Enchant} a <white>{Body Armour}. Quality does not increase its Defences, grants <enchanted>{+1% to Fire Resistance per 2% quality}
Text.zh: <white>{附魔}一件<white>{护甲}。品质不会增加其防御，<enchanted>{品质每增加2%，增加1%火焰抗性}。

Description.zh: 附魔一件护甲。质量不会增加其防御，质量每增加2%，增加1%火焰抗性。

Text.en: <white>{Reforge} the colour of a random <white>{socket} on an item, turning it <white>{White}
